# HOW TO USE
Before understaing the steps to get in order to work with DEDALUS, be sure to check and to remember all the next listed components as getting on the line in case of failure.

## Machine Checks

## Usage Procedure
The Power-On of the machine is relied just on the main plug and switch, than both Axes Controller Board and Raspberry will start. The Raspberry is configure as an internet `Access Point`: after turning on the switch, the `Access Point` Network is quickly available from any external device.

It's then possible to connect via `SSH` at the network `DedalusAP`. MADS framework is already running as a startup service.
